productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Navy Blue Printed Dress
description: Style Note This navy blue dress, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this fabulous dress. Style this with understated accessories and heeled shoes. Product Details Navy blue and white printed dress that has a round neck, broad straps with pleats, a zipped opening n the chest and a broad band on the waist Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing a size M
